headlines.text: EMPTY! FIFTY YEARS OF LANTERNSIDE, VANISHED

reactions.chalkboard: THE EMPTY ESPRESSO — nothing in it, like the capsule
THE EMPTY ESPRESSO — nothing in it, like the capsule

headlines.text: A District Holds Its Breath, Together

reactions.chalkboard: THE HOLDING PATTERN — steamed slow, shared warm

kickers.text: The Ledger will print what it knows, as it knows it. Tonight, that is this.
Fifty years went into that vault. This paper intends to find out where they went.
Whatever left the vault, the town that filled it is still here.
